1842140.name: Odd Infinitum
1842140.description:
Gameplay

Odd Infinitum is a 16-bit shoot-em-up boss rush featuring 11 exhilarating boss battles against machine, alien, and pilot foes alike.  Combat the oncoming threats using an arsenal of elite sci-fi weaponry at your disposal. The cast of characters you'll meet on the adventure can provide useful items and gear... or have nefarious intent.

Features

  • Boss Battles - a mining machine gone rogue, a massive wall of writhing flesh, an angelic husk, an afflicted paramilitary squad, and more

  • Custom Loadouts - build your loadout with a combination of primary laser weapons, power secondary missiles, and augments granting passive and active abilities

  • Characters - each character you meet can help you combat the oncoming alien invasion... or may stab you in the back

Story

The year is 3065.

In the 31st century, humanity expanded its reach beyond Earth and colonized a galaxy-spanning empire. Although alliances with certain alien races are tenuous, the human race enjoys a time of relative peace.

You are a spacecraft pilot freshly recruited from the academy into the United Systems Defense Force (U.S.D.F.), humanity's first line of defense against extraterrestrial threats.

After a distress signal is sent out from a remote asteroid colony, you are sent to investigate. What you encounter is unlike anything humanity has yet to see.
